news.title: Second arrest made in shooting up of downtown Athens businesses
news.summary: A19-year-old man was first arrested last week and now, Athens-Clarke County Police say, a 21-year-old is also in custody.

news.title: Former High Museum COO pleads guilty to federal fraud charge
news.summary: The former chief operating officer of the High Museum of Art has pleaded guilty in Atlanta after federal prosecutors accused him of stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars from the cultural institut

news.title: DeKalb Police investigating shooting with one person seriously injured
news.summary: DeKalb County Police said Monday afternoon that officers responded to a scene on Wellborn Road.

news.title: Big Tigger's wife arrested in Hart County on kidnapping warrant out of Maryland
news.summary: The Hart County Sheriff's Office identified the suspect as 37-year-old Alicia Denise Brown of Atlanta, the wife of Big Tigger.

news.title: Woman reportedly assaulted walking in Norcross, police seek man
news.summary: Gwinnett County police are searching for a man they say assaulted a woman while she was out walking in Norcross earlier this month.

news.title: Gwinnett police hunt for suspect in Norcross domestic homicide
news.summary: Gwinnett County police are searching for a 25-year-old man after a woman was found dead inside a Norcross apartment complex last week.

news.title: Gwinnett Police ask for help identifying suspect who allegedly assaulted woman who was on her morning walk
news.summary: Gwinnett County Police say a woman was approached by a man from behind and assaulted on July 1 at the intersection of Old Norcross Tucker Road and Glenbrook Drive.

news.title: Former High Museum executive pleads guilty to embezzling $600,000
news.summary: The former Chief Operating Officer of the High Museum of Art in Atlanta pled guilty to federal theft charges after being accused of “pilfering” $600,000 from the museum.

news.title: Woman accused of crashing, flipping car in metro Atlanta, faces open container charge
news.summary: The Austell Police Department said a woman was taken into custody after a late-night crash on July 11.

news.title: Lil Toonk arrested on Fulton County homicide warrant
news.summary: A Georgia music artist was arrested Saturday night after deputies tracked him down on an outstanding Fulton County homicide warrant, according to officials.

news.title: Suspect arrested in connection to deadly Fourth of July shooting in Atlanta, police say
news.summary: A man was found dead underneath a bridge on Pryor Street on the Fourth of July.

news.title: Murder suspect wanted in Fulton County arrested in Lamar County, deputies say
news.summary: During the operation, investigators also recovered multiple firearms, including rifles and a handgun, along with other evidence, according to the sheriff's office.

news.title: DeKalb County police find woman dead, suspect injured after early morning shooting
news.summary: A woman was found dead from a gunshot wound in DeKalb County, and a suspect was detained nearby, police report. The investigation is ongoing.
